generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the cart, controllable via TMC4671‑Eval controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the hoist, controllable via TMC4671‑Eval controller"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671‑Eval motor controller for the cart stepper motor"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671‑Eval motor controller for the hoist stepper motor"
]

instance HoistElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the hoist end used for gripping loads"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder measuring hoist swing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (Data transmission)
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance OperationalTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series operational data (sensor readings, status) stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance CADGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometry model of the lab‑scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADSoftwareEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the Trajectory Generator to compute motion plans"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicEngineEnabler
]

instance DynamicSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model of the crane and its controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DynamicSimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance ContinuousValidationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Continuous validation model performing distance‑metric comparison of executed vs. simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEngineEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DockerComposeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker and Docker‑Compose containerisation platform hosting all services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBService,
                    GrafanaDashboardService,
                    MQTTBrokerService,
                    TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                    SimulationService,
                    ContinuousValidationService,
                    HumanMachineInterfaceService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL extension) for time‑series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker providing publish/subscribe messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                    SimulationService,
                    ContinuousValidationService,
                    HumanMachineInterfaceService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization engine used by the dashboard service"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaDashboardService
]

instance PythonRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python runtime and gantrylib module used by interfaces and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables HumanMachineInterfaceService,
                    TimescaleDBService
]

instance CADSoftwareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software providing geometry data to the simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance KinematicEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kinematic computation engine used by the Trajectory Generator"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance DynamicSimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Physics engine used by the Simulation Service"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ValidationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model validation engine used by the Continuous Validation Service"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance TimescaleDBService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data logging service that writes operational time‑series data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides StoreOperationalDataAction
]

instance GrafanaDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for visualization and real‑time alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeDataAction,
                    TrajectoryDeviationAlertInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for service coordination and event notifications"
    DTDFVocab:provides PublishMqttEventAction
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal swing‑free motion trajectories for the crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalMotionPlanInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics and controller behavior as a digital replica"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares executed vs. simulated trajectories and raises alerts when deviation exceeds thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryDeviationAlertInsight
]

instance HumanMachineInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human‑Machine Interface allowing operators to adjust logging parameters and issue control commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLoggingParametersAction,
                    ExecuteControlCommandAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance TrajectoryDeviationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time alert on Grafana when trajectory deviation exceeds configured limits"
]

instance OptimalMotionPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal swing‑free motion plan generated by the Trajectory Generator"
]

instance SimulatedTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated trajectory data produced by the Simulation Service"
]

// C17: Actions
instance StoreOperationalDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Store incoming sensor and status data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PublishMqttEventAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Publish event notifications to other services via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizeDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Render time‑series data on the Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustLoggingParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator adjusts data‑logging parameters through the HMI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ExecuteControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator sends control commands to the crane via the HMI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C14: Environment
instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepperMotor,
                    HoistStepperMotor,
                    CartMotorController,
                    HoistMotorController,
                    HoistElectromagnet,
                    SwingAngleEncoder,
                    AnemometerSensor
]

// C15: Component (physical crane hardware)
instance PhysicalCraneHardware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane system with frame, cart, hoist, stepper motors, controllers, electromagnet, swing‑angle encoder, anemometer, Arduino board and power supply"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends motion commands and trajectory set‑points (generated by the Trajectory Generator Service) to the Physical Crane Interface, which forwards them to the motor controllers and electromagnet, thereby actuating the cart, hoist and pick‑up actions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane ↔ Python Physical Crane Interface ↔ Control and Logging applications; services communicate via MQTT broker; all persistent data reside in TimescaleDB; Grafana visualizes database content; all services are Docker‑containerised and orchestrated with a single docker‑compose command."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin covers design (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360), manufacturing (Bill‑of‑Materials and Arduino shield), and operation (runtime data acquisition, logging, simulation and validation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service continuously compares measured trajectories with simulated ones, computes distance metrics, and raises alerts when the metric exceeds a predefined threshold; the simulation uses the same kinematic model as the trajectory generator to ensure model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for lightweight publish/subscribe signaling between services; PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB for time‑series storage accessed via standard SQL; Python APIs for direct serial/USB communication with the Arduino and motor controllers."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software runs on a single personal computer; Docker containers host the database, MQTT broker and Grafana dashboard; Docker‑Compose automates setup and networking; the gantrylib Python module is installed with pip; the repository is publicly available on GitHub."
]
